prd.oneLiner: Connect vehicle availability, reservation and approval, dispatch and return, inspection and maintenance history, and utilization analysis.
prd.goal: Reduce vehicle reservation conflicts by 80% and make fleet utilization visible.
prd.whyNow: Vehicle booking and key control are spread across calendars and chat, causing collisions, late returns, and missing maintenance history.
prd.problem: Vehicle booking and key control are spread across calendars and chat, causing collisions, late returns, and missing maintenance history.
prd.solution: Connect vehicle availability, reservation and approval, dispatch and return, inspection and maintenance history, and utilization analysis.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: Employee reserving a business vehicle
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: Vehicle booking and key control are spread across calendars and chat, causing collisions, late returns, and missing maintenance history.

targets.name: General affairs and fleet operations coordinator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: Vehicle booking and key control are spread across calendars and chat, causing collisions, late returns, and missing maintenance history.

scenarios.text: Employee reserving a business vehicle completes vehicle reservation and trip-purpose submission and checks progress.
General affairs and fleet operations coordinator reviews vehicle utilization, trip-purpose, and maintenance-status reporting.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Reduce vehicle reservation conflicts by 80% and make fleet utilization visible.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: Vehicle availability, reservations, and trip-history lookup
Reservation approval, dispatch, return inspection, and maintenance request handling
Vehicle utilization, trip-purpose, and maintenance-status reporting
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
